---
title: "The House of Prayer, or a Practical exposition of the Order for Morning and Evening Prayer in the Church of England"
---

## The House of Prayer, or a Practical exposition of the Order for Morning and Evening Prayer in the Church of England

**Author:** George Frederick De Teisser
**Date:** 1866
**Imprint:** London: Macmillan

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
